axioms: Axiom list_tl_unique : forall (l : list Z) (l1 : list Z), (tl l l1 /\ uniq l) -> (uniq l1).
Axiom list_hd_unique : forall (l : list Z) (l1 : list Z) (x : Z), tl l l1 /\ uniq l /\ hd l x -> ~ (list_mem l1 x).
axiom_proofs: Lemma list_tl_unique : forall (l : list Z) (l1 : list Z), (tl l l1 /\ uniq l) -> (uniq l1).
- simpl in Ht. simpl in Hu. subst. intuition.
Lemma list_hd_unique : forall (l : list Z) (l1 : list Z) (x : Z),
tl l l1 /\ uniq l /\ hd l x -> ~ (list_mem l1 x).
- simpl in Hu. destruct Hu as [Htm Htu].
proof: exists x1. exists t. (* exists x. exists l. *)
- apply (list_hd_unique v t x1) in H10. contradiction.
